case_title: STEVENSON, DENNIS J. vs. ZELINKA, RANDY JULIUS INDV/DBA ZELINKA ELECTRIC

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF STEVENSON, DENNIS J. AS TO DEFENDANT ZELINKA, RANDY JULIUS INDV/DBA ZELINKA ELECTRIC
